revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Bot: undo last edit ([[Special:Diff/3062759]])
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 2]]</noinclude>"
Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3064789]])
Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3064363]])
Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3062759]])
Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3061714]])
Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3060400]])
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhist_temples_in_China here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhist_temples_in_China for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Buddhist temples in China | title = Buddhist temples in China | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| titlestyle = background:#FFD700; color:Sienna;
| abbr1 = movement | list1 = {{Navbox|subgroup | title = [[:en:List of Buddhist architecture in China|Chinese Buddhist architecture]]
| titlestyle = background:#FCC200; | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = Architectonic elements | list1 = * [[:en:Chiwen|Chiwen]] ({{zh|c=鴟吻|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:East Asian hip-and-gable roof|Hip-and-gable roof]] ({{zh|c=歇山頂|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Dougong|Dougong]] ({{zh|c=斗拱|p=|labels=no}}) * {{ill|Huilang|zh|回廊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huilang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huilang|qq=}} ({{zh|c=回廊|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Spirit screen|Spirit screen]] ({{zh|c=影壁|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Stone lantern|Denglong]] ({{zh|c=石燈籠|p=|labels=no}}) * [[Terrace (China)|Terrace]] ({{zh|c=台|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Chinese pavilion|Chinese pavilion]] ({{zh|c=亭|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Pagoda|Pagoda]] ({{zh|c=塔|p=|labels=no}}) * [[Stupa]] ({{zh|c=舍利塔|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Chinese guardian lions|Chinese guardian lions]] ({{zh|c=石狮子|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Heng and Ha|Heng and Ha]] ({{zh|c=金剛力士/哼哈二將|p=|labels=no}})
| group2 = Men (gates) | list2 = * [[:en:Shanmen|Shanmen]] (Mount gate) ({{zh|c=山門|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Paifang|Paifang]] ({{zh|c=牌門|p=|labels=no}})
| group3 = Buildings | list3 = * [[:en:Shanmen|Shanmen]] (Hall of Mount Gate; {{zh|c=山門殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Four Heavenly Kings|Hall of Four Heavenly Kings]] ({{zh|c=天王殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Mahavira Hall|Mahavira Hall]] ({{zh|c=大雄寶殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Bell tower (Chinese Buddhism)|Bell tower]] ({{zh|c=鐘樓|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Drum tower (Chinese Buddhism)|Drum tower]] ({{zh|c=鼓樓|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Dharma Hall|Dharma Hall]] ({{zh|c=法堂|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Sangharama Palace|Hall of Sangharama Palace]] ({{zh|c=伽藍殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Guru|Hall of Guru]] ({{zh|c=祖師殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Kshitigarbha|Hall of Kshitigarbha]] ({{zh|c=地藏殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Bhaisajyaguru|Hall of Bhaisajyaguru]] ({{zh|c=藥師殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Hall of Guanyin|Hall of Guanyin]] ({{zh|c=觀音殿|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Arhat Hall|Arhat Hall]] ({{zh|c=羅漢堂|p=|labels=no}}) * [[Abbot's Room]] ({{zh|c=方丈|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Buddhist texts library|Buddhist texts library]] ({{zh|c=藏經閣|p=|labels=no}}) * [[:en:Free Life Pond|Free Life Pond]] ({{zh|c=放生池|p=|labels=no}}) }} <!-- | group4 = [[Chinese pagoda]]s | list4 = * [[]] --> | list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | title = [[:en:Chinese Buddhism|Schools and objects of worship]]
| titlestyle = background:#FCC200; | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = Major schools | list1 = * [[:en:Chan Buddhism|Chan]] * [[:en:Tiantai|Tiantai]] * [[:en:Huayan|Huayan]] * [[:en:Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land]] * [[:en:East Asian Yogācāra|Weishi]] * [[:en:East Asian Mādhyamaka|Sanlun]] * [[:en:Tangmi|Tangmi]]
| group2 = [[:en:Chan Buddhism|Chan]] schools | list2 = * [[:en:en:Linji school|en:Linji school]] * [[:en:Caodong school|Caodong school]] * [[:en:Guiyang school|Guiyang school]] * [[:en:Yunmen school|Yunmen school]] * [[:en:Fayan school|Fayan school]] }}
| list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup | title = Notable Buddhist temples in China
| titlestyle = background:#FCC200; | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = | list1 = * [[:en:Baoguang Temple|Baoguang Temple]] * [[:en:Baoguo Temple (Zhejiang)|Baoguo Temple]] * [[:en:Dabeilou Temple|Dabeilou Temple]] * [[:en:Dafo Temple (Xinchang)|Dafo Temple, Xinchang]] * [[:en:Dafo Temple (Zhangye)|Dafo Temple, Zhangye]] * [[:en:Donglin Temple (Jiujiang)|Donglin Temple]] * [[:en:Donglin Temple (Shanghai)|Donglin Temple (Shanghai)]] * [[:en:Famen Temple|Famen Temple]] * [[:en:Fawang Temple|Fawang Temple]] * [[:en:Fayu Temple|Fayu Temple]] * [[:en:Fengguo Temple|Fengguo Temple]] * [[:en:Foguang Temple|Foguang Temple]] * [[:en:Geyuan Temple|Geyuan Temple]] * [[:en:Grand Temple of Mount Heng|Grand Temple of Mount Heng]] * [[:en:Guanghua Temple (Putian)|Guanghua Temple]] * [[:en:Gufo Temple|Gufo Temple]] * [[:en:Guiyuan Temple|Guiyuan Temple]] * [[:en:Guoqing Temple|Guoqing Temple]] * [[:en:Hanging Temple|Hanging Temple]] * [[:en:Hanshan Temple|Hanshan Temple]] * [[:en:Huacheng Temple|Huacheng Temple]] * [[:en:Yunyan Temple (Suzhou)|Huqiu Temple]] * [[Jade Buddha Temple]] * [[:en:Jianfu Temple|Jianfu Temple]] * [[:en:Jile Temple|Jile Temple]] * [[:en:Jiming Temple|Jiming Temple]] * [[:en:Jing'an Temple|Jing'an Temple]] * [[:en:Jingci Temple|Jingci Temple]] * [[:en:Jinge Temple|Jinge Temple]] * [[:en:Kaishan Temple|Kaishan Temple]] * [[:en:Kumbum Monastery|Kumbum Monastery]] * [[:en:Linggu Temple|Linggu Temple]] * [[:en:Lingyan Temple (Jinan)|Lingyan Temple]] * [[Lingyin Temple]] * [[:en:Longhua Temple|Longhua Temple]] * [[:en:Longxing Temple|Longxing Temple]] * [[:en:Lake Manasarovar|Lake Manasarovar]] * [[:en:Mimi Temple|Mimi Temple]] * [[:en:Nanchan Temple|Nanchan Temple]] * [[:en:Nanhua Temple|Nanhua Temple]] * [[:en:South Putuo Temple|South Putuo Temple]] * [[:en:Pagoda Forest at Shaolin Temple|Pagoda Forest at Shaolin Temple]] * [[:en:Palpung Monastery|Palpung Monastery]] * [[:en:Puji Temple|Puji Temple]] * [[:en:Puning Temple (Hebei)|Puning Temple (Hebei)]] * [[:en:Puning Temple (Jiangxi)|Puning Temple (Jiangxi)]] * [[:en:Putuo Zongcheng Temple|Putuo Zongcheng Temple]] * [[:en:Qiongzhu Temple|Qiongzhu Temple]] * [[:en:Qixia Temple|Qixia Temple]] * [[:en:Shanhua Temple|Shanhua Temple]] * [[:en:Shaolin Monastery|Shaolin Monastery]] * [[:en:Shuanglin Temple|Shuanglin Temple]] * [[:en:Spring Temple Buddha|Spring Temple Buddha]] * [[:en:Standard Design for Buddhist Temple Construction|Standard Design for Buddhist Temple Construction]] * [[:en:Guangxiao Temple (Guangzhou)|Temple of Bright Filial Piety]] * [[:en:Temple of Great Compassion|Temple of Great Compassion]] * [[:en:Temple of the Six Banyan Trees|Temple of the Six Banyan Trees]] * [[:en:Tianning Temple (Changzhou)|Tianning Temple]] * [[:en:Huashoutai|Wa Sau Toi]] * [[:en:Wanfu Temple|Wanfu Temple]] * [[:en:White Horse Temple|White Horse Temple]] * [[:en:Wolong Temple|Wolong Temple]] * [[:en:Xiangyan Temple|Xiangyan Temple]] * [[:en:Ximing Temple|Ximing Temple]] * [[:en:Xingjiao Temple|Xingjiao Temple]] * [[:en:Yanqing Temple|Yanqing Temple]] * [[:en:Yanshan Temple|Yanshan Temple]] * [[:en:Youguo Temple|Youguo Temple]] * [[:en:Zhanshan Temple|Zhanshan Temple]] * [[:en:Zhenguo Temple|Zhenguo Temple]] * [[:en:Zunsheng Temple|Zunsheng Temple]] * [[:en:Daxiangguo Temple|Daxiangguo Temple]] }} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Buddhism in China templates]]
}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
